name: Subsurface Scavenger
reasoning: V2 best balances all criteria. It features a properly anatomical gaunt scavenger in a crouching pose with correct hand structure, excellent prompt adherence (tattered rags, hollow face, wrapped hands, torchlight, scattered bones/debris), and strong composition with clear focal point readable at card size. The heavy shadows and minimal warm torchlight perfectly match the black color identity and post-apocalyptic mood. V1 is too photorealistic and lacks the stylized digital illustration feel. V3 has anatomical issues with the hand reaching toward the glowing object appearing distorted/fused, and the overall pose feels less natural.

artifacts_found.issue: Overly photorealistic rendering, lacks stylized digital illustration aesthetic specified in prompt
Hand reaching toward glowing object shows distorted/fused finger anatomy, unnatural hand positioning
